New AI Integration Readiness Intake

Name: Jordan Lee
Email: jordan@example.com
Company: Acme Field Services
Website: https://acme.example

What the company does:
Regional field service company handling installation and maintenance dispatch.

Workflow to improve:
Automate website intake, email triage, CRM updates, and follow-up scheduling for new service requests.

Tools:
Email, Calendar, HubSpot, Google Sheets

Where work gets stuck:
Requests arrive in several inboxes and coordinators manually copy details into the CRM before scheduling.

Sensitive data or access concerns:
Customer contact details and job addresses. No payment or health data.

Interest: Ready for a pilot
Budget: Not provided
Timeline: This month

Anything else:
They want a low-risk proof of concept before broader access.
